server supports caching terminology resources between calls. Clients only need to send value sets and codesystems once; thereafter they are automatically in scope for calls with the same cache-id. The cache is retained for 30 min from last call"},{"name":"tx-resource","documentation":"Additional valuesets needed for evaluation e.g. value sets referred to from the import statement of the value set being expanded"},{"name":"_incomplete"},{"name":"abstract"},{"name":"activeOnly"},{"name":"check-system-version"},{"name":"count"},{"name":"default-to-latest-version"},{"name":"displayLanguage"},{"name":"excludeNested"},{"name":"excludeNotForUI"},{"name":"excludePostCoordinated"},{"name":"force-system-version"},{"name":"inactive"},{"name":"includeAlternateCodes"},{"name":"includeDefinition"},{"name":"includeDesignations"},{"name":"incomplete-ok"},{"name":"limitedExpansion"},{"name":"mode","documentation":"=lenient-display-validation"},{"name":"no-cache"},{"name":"offset"},{"name":"profile"},{"name":"property"},{"name":"system-version"},{"name":"valueSetMode","documentation":"= CHECK_MEMBERSHIP_ONLY | NO_MEMBERSHIP_CHECK"}]},"validateCode":{"translations":true},"translation":{"needsMap":false}}

where a resource is intended to be used.   \r\n   \r\n   Note: The codes for countries and country subdivisions are taken from    [ISO 3166](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html)    while {"resourceType":"Bundle","type":"searchset","total":2,"link":[{"relation":"self","url":"http://tx.fhir.org/r4/CodeSystem?_format=json&url=http%3A%2F%2Fterminology.hl7.org%2FCodeSystem%2Fv2-0203&_offset=0"},{"relation":"first","url":"http://tx.fhir.org/r4/CodeSystem?_format=json&url=http%3A%2F%2Fterminology.hl7.org%2FCodeSystem%2Fv2-0203&_offset=0"},{"relation":"last","url":"http://tx.fhir.org/r4/CodeSystem?_format=json&url=http%3A%2F%2Fterminology.hl7.org%2FCodeSystem%2Fv2-0203&_offset=0"}],"entry":[{"fullUrl":"http://tx.fhir.org/r4/CodeSystem/v2-0203","search":{"mode":"match"},"resource":{"resourceType":"CodeSystem","id":"v2-0203","meta":{"profile":["http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/shareablecodesystem"]},"language":"en","extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-standards-status","valueCode":"normative"},{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-fmm","valueInteger":5},{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-wg","valueCode":"fhir"},{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-normative-version","valueCode":"4.0.0"}],"url":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203","identifier":[{"system":"urn:ietf:rfc:3986","value":"urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.18.108"}],"version":"2.9","name":"v2.0203","title":"v2 Identifier Type","status":"active","experimental":false,"publisher":"HL7, Inc","contact":[{"telecom":[{"system":"url","value":"http://hl7.org"}]}],"description":"FHIR Value set/code system definition for HL7 v2 table 0203 ( Identifier Type)","content":"complete","concept":[{"code":"AC","display":"Accreditation/Certification Identifier"},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Accession Identifier","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Accession identificatie"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"ACSN","display":"Accession ID","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Accession ID"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Deprecated and replaced by BC in v 2.5.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Vervangen door BC vanaf v2.5"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"AM","display":"American Express","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"American Express"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"American Express"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A physician identifier assigned by the AMA.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een zorgverleneridentificatie toegekend door de AMA"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"AMA","display":"American Medical Association Number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"American Medical Association nummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier that is unique to an account.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een unieke identificatie van het account"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"AN","display":"Account number","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Kontonummer"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Accountnummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Financial\r\nA more precise definition of an account number: sometimes two distinct account numbers must be transmitted in the same message, one as the creditor, the other as the debitor.\r\nKreditorenkontonummer","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: financieel. Een preciesere definitie van een accountnummer: soms moeten 2 verschillende accountnummers moeten worden doorgegeven in hetzelfde bericht, een als crediteur, de andere als debiteur. Crediteuraccountnummer."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"ANC","display":"Account number Creditor","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Accountnummer crediteur"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Financial\r\nA more precise definition of an account number: sometimes two distinct account numbers must be transmitted in the same message, one as the creditor, the other as the debitor.\r\nDebitorenkontonummer","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: financieel. Een preciesere definitie van een accountnummer: soms moeten 2 verschillende accountnummers moeten worden doorgegeven in hetzelfde bericht, een als crediteur, de andere als debiteur. Debiteuraccountnummer."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"AND","display":"Account number debitor","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Accountnummer debiteur"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier for a living subject whose real identity is protected or suppressed\r\nJustification: For public health reporting purposes, anonymous identifiers are occasionally used for protecting patient identity in reporting certain results. For instance, a state health department may choose to use a scheme for generating an anonymous identifier for reporting a patient that has had a positive human immunodeficiency virus antibody test. Anonymous identifiers can be used in PID 3 by replacing the medical record number or other non-anonymous identifier. The assigning authority for an anonymous identifier would be the state/local health department.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Verklaring: t.b.v. volksgezondheid-doeleinden worden anonieme identificaties soms gebruikt voor bescherming van de identiteit van de patiënt bij melden van bepaalde resultaten. Zo kan een gezondheidsafdeling van een overheid voor een algoritme voor het genereren van nummers kiezen bij patiënten met een positieve HIV-antilichamentest. Anonieme identificaties kunnen worden gebruikt in PID-3 door het medisch dossiernummer of ander niet-anonieme identificatie te vervangen. De toekennende autoriteit voor de anonieme identificatie is dan de betreffende overheidsafdeling."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"ANON","display":"Anonymous identifier","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Anonieme identificatie"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Financial\r\nTemporary version of an Account Number.\r\nUse Case: An ancillary system that does not normally assign account numbers is the first time to register a patient. This ancillary system will generate a temporary account number that will only be used until an official account number is assigned.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: financieel. Tijdelijke versie van een accountnummer. Use case: een satellietsysteem dat normaal geen accountnummers toekent, is de eerste plaats waar een patiënt wordt geregistreerd. Dit satellietsysteem zal een tijdelijk accountnummer genereren dat wordt gebruikt totdat een officieel accountnummer wordt toegekend."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"ANT","display":"Temporary Account Number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Tijdelijk accountnummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier that is unique to an advanced practice registered nurse within the jurisdiction of a certifying board"}],"code":"APRN","display":"Advanced Practice Registered Nurse number"},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A unique identifier for the ancestor specimen. All child, grandchild, etc. specimens of the ancestor specimen share the same Ancestor Specimen ID.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een unieke identificatie voor het oorspronkelijke monster. Alle afgeleide (kind, kleinkind, etc.) monsters van het oorspronkelijke monster delen hetzelfde Oorspronkelijke monster ID"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"ASID","display":"Ancestor Specimen ID","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Oorspronkelijk monster ID"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Financial","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: financieel"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"BA","display":"Bank Account Number","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Bank Kontonummer"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Bankrekeningnummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Financial\r\nAn identifier that is unique to a person's bank card. Replaces AM, DI, DS, MS, and VS beginning in v 2.5.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: financieel. Een identificatie die uniek is voor iemand's bankpas. Vervangt AM, DI, DS, MS en VS vanaf v2.5"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"BC","display":"Bank Card Number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Bankrekeningnummer"}]},{"code":"BCFN","display":"Birth Certificate File Number"},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number associated with a document identifying the event of a person's birth.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een nummer gekoppeld aan een document die de geboorte van een persoon documenteert."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"BCT","display":"Birth Certificate","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Geboortecertificaat"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier unique within the Assigning Authority that is the official legal record of a person's birth.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een nummer gekoppeld aan de toekennende autoriteit die het officieel wettelijk afschrift van de geboorte van een persoon bijhoudt."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"BR","display":"Birth registry number","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Geburtsregisternummer"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Geboorteregister-nummer"}]},{"code":"BRN","display":"Breed Registry Number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Dierenras-registernummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Betriebsstättennummer - for use in the German realm.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Betriebsstättennummer - voor gebruik in Duitse context."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"BSNR","display":"Primary physician office number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Primair zorgverlenerpraktijknummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Financial\r\nUse Case: needed especially for transmitting information about invoices.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: financieel. Use case: specifiek nodig voor doorgeven van informatie over facturen."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"CC","display":"Cost Center number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Kostenplaatsnummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number associated with a document identifying a person's legal change of name.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie gekoppeld aan een document met daarop de officiële wijziging van persoonsnaam."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"CONM","display":"Change of Name Document","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Naamswijzigingdocument"}]},{"code":"CY","display":"County number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"County-nummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number assigned by a person's country of residence to identify a person's citizenship.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie gekoppeld aan het land van inwonerschap van een persoon om iemand staatsburgerschap aan te duiden."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"CZ","display":"Citizenship Card","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Staatsburgerschapkaart"}]},{"code":"DC","display":"Death Certificate ID"},{"code":"DCFN","display":"Death Certificate File Number"},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier that is unique to a dentist within the jurisdiction of the licensing board","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie die uniek is voor een tandarts binnen het rechtsgebied van de licentiegever."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"DDS","display":"Dentist license number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Tandarts licentienummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier for an individual or organization relative to controlled substance regulation and transactions.\r\nUse case: This is a registration number that identifies an individual or organization relative to controlled substance regulation and transactions. \r\nA DEA number has a very precise and widely accepted meaning within the United States. Surprisingly, the US Drug Enforcement Administration does not solely assign DEA numbers in the United States. Hospitals have the authority to issue DEA numbers to their medical residents. These DEA numbers are based upon the hospital’s DEA number, but the authority rests with the hospital on the assignment to the residents. Thus, DEA as an Identifier Type is necessary in addition to DEA as an Assigning Authority.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Use case: dit is een registratienummer die een persoon of organisatie aanduidt, gerelateerd aan gereguleerde substantie-wetgeving en transacties."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"DEA","display":"Drug Enforcement Administration registration number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Amerikaanse Drug Enforcement Administration registratienummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier issued to a health care provider authorizing the person to write drug orders\r\nUse Case: A nurse practitioner has authorization to furnish or prescribe pharmaceutical substances; this identifier is in component 1.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie uitgegeven aan een zorgverlener die de persoon autoriseert om medicatie voor te schrijven. Use case: een nurse practitioner heeft toestemming om farmaceutische substanties te verstrekken of voor te schrijven; deze identificatie staat in component 1."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"DFN","display":"Drug Furnishing or prescriptive authority Number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Medicatieverstrekker of voorschrijver autoriteitnummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Deprecated and replaced by BC in v 2.5.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Vervangen door BC vanaf v2.5"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"DI","display":"Diner's Club Insurance\r\n2 uses: a) UK jurisdictional CHI number; b) Canadian provincial health card number:","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"2 use cases: a) CHI-nummer van rechtsgebied in Verenigd Koninkrijk; b) Canadees provinciaal gezondheidskaartnummer:"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"JHN","display":"Jurisdictional health number (Canada)","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Rechtsgebied gezondheidsnummer (Canada)"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A laboratory accession id is used in the laboratory domain. The concept of accession is used in other domains such as radiology, so the LACSN is used to distinguish a lab accession id from an radiology accession id","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een laboratorium accessie ID wordt gebruikt in het laboratoriumdomein. Het concept accessie wordt ook in andere domeinen gebruikt zoals radiologie, dus de LACSN wordt gebruikt om onderscheid te maken tussen een lab accessie ID en een radiologie accessie ID."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"LACSN","display":"Laboratory Accession ID","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Laboratorium Accessie ID"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Insurance","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: verzekering"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"MA","display":"Patient Medicaid number","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Armennummer"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Medicaid patiëntnummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier for the insured of an insurance policy (this insured always has a subscriber), usually assigned by the insurance carrier.\r\nUse Case: Person is covered by an insurance policy. This person may or may not be the subscriber of the policy.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Use case: persoon is gedekt door verzekeringspolis. Deze persoon is mogelijk tevens hoofdpolishouder."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"MB","display":"Member Number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Lidnummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: verzekering"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"MC","display":"Patient's Medicare number","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Rentnernummer"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Medicare patiëntnummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Insurance","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: verzekering"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"MCD","display":"Practitioner Medicaid number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Medicaid zorgverlenernummer"}]},{"code":"MCN","display":"Microchip Number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Microchip-nummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Insurance","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: verzekering"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"MCR","display":"Practitioner Medicare number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Medicare zorgverlenernummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number associated with a document identifying the event of a person's marriage.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie gekoppeld aan een document dat het huwelijk van een persoon aantoont."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"MCT","display":"Marriage Certificate","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Huwelijkscertificaat"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier that is unique to a medical doctor within the jurisdiction of a licensing board.\r\nUse Case: These license numbers are sometimes used as identifiers. In some states, the same authority issues all three identifiers, e.g., medical, osteopathic, and physician assistant licenses all issued by one state medical board. For this case, the CX data type requires distinct identifier types to accurately interpret component 1. Additionally, the distinction among these license types is critical in most health care settings (this is not to convey full licensing information, which requires a segment to support all related attributes).","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie die unieke is voor een arts binnen het rechtsgebied van een licentiegever. Use case: deze licentienummers worden soms gebruikt ter identificatie. In sommige staten, geeft dezelfde autoriteit alle drie identificaties uit, bijv. medisch, osteopathisch, en arts-assistent licenties die alle worden uitgegeven door één overheidsinstantie. Voor dit geval vereist het CX datatype afzonderlijke identificatietypen om component 1 te kunnen interpreteren. Daarnaast is onderscheid tussen deze licentietypen essentieel in de meeste zorgsituaties (niet om volledige licentie-informatie door te geven, waarvoor een segment voor alle gerelateerde attributen nodig zou zijn)."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"MD","display":"Medical License number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Geneeskundig licentienummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number assigned to an individual who has had military duty, but is not currently on active duty. The number is assigned by the DOD or Veterans' Affairs (VA).","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie toegekend aan een persoon die in militaire dienst is geweest, maar op dit moment niet in actieve dienst. Het nummer wordt toegekend door de Amerikaanse Department of Defense (DOD) of Veteran's Affairs (VA)."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"MI","display":"Military ID number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Militaire identificatie"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier that is unique to a patient within a set of medical records, not necessarily unique within an application.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie gekoppeld aan een patiënt binnen een set van medische dossiers, niet noodzakelijk uniek binnen een applicatie."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"MR","display":"Medical record number","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Krankenaktennummer"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Medisch dossiernummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Temporary version of a Medical Record Number\r\nUse Case: An ancillary system that does not normally assign medical record numbers is the first time to register a patient. This ancillary system will generate a temporary medical record number that will only be used until an official medical record number is assigned.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Use case: een satellietsysteem dat normaal geen medische dossiernummer toekent is het eerste systeem waar een patiënt wordt geregistreerd. Dit satellietsysteem geeft een tijdelijk medisch dossiernummer uit dat alleen wordt gebruikt totdat het officiële medisch dossiernummer wordt toegekend."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"MRT","display":"Temporary Medical Record Number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Tijdelijke medisch dossiernummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Deprecated and replaced by BC in v 2.5.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Vervangen door BC vanaf v2.5"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"MS","display":"MasterCard","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"MasterCard"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"MasterCard"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Nebenbetriebsstättennummer - for use in the German realm.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Nebenbetriebsstättennummer - voor gebruik in Duitse context."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"NBSNR","display":"Secondary physician office number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Secundaire zorgverlenerpraktijknummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number associated with a document identifying a person's retention of citizenship in a particular country.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie gekoppeld aan een document dat het verwerven van staatburgerschap in een bepaald land aantoont."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"NCT","display":"Naturalization Certificate","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Naturalisatiecertificaat"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"In the US, the Assigning Authority for this value is typically CMS, but it may be used by all providers and insurance companies in HIPAA related transactions.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"In de VS is de toekennende autoriteit voor deze waarde meestal CMS, maar het kan worden gebruikt voor alle zorgaanbieders/zorverleners en verzekeraars in HIPAA gerelateerde transacties."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"NE","display":"National employer identifier","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Nationale werkgeveridentificatie"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Insurance\r\nUsed for the UK NHS national identifier.\r\nIn the US, the Assigning Authority for this value is typically CMS, but it may be used by all providers and insurance companies in HIPAA related transactions.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Ten behoeve de NHS nationale identificatie in het Verenigd Koninkrijk"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"NH","display":"National Health Plan Identifier","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Nationaal zorgverzekeringsnummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Insurance\r\nIn the US, the Assigning Authority for this value is typically CMS, but it may be used by all providers and insurance companies in HIPAA related transactions.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"In de VS is de toekennende autoriteit voor deze waarde normalerwijs CMS, maar het kan door alle zorgaanbieders en verzekeraars worden gebruikt in HIPAA-gerelateerde transacties."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"NI","display":"National unique individual identifier","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Nationale unieke identificatie persoon"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Insurance\r\nIn Germany a national identifier for an insurance company. It is printed on the insurance card (health card). It is not to be confused with the health card number itself.\r\nKrankenkassen-ID der KV-Karte","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: verzekering. In Duitsland is dit een nationale identificatie voor een verzekeraar. Deze staat op de verzekeringskaart. De identificatie moet niet worden verward met het kaartnummer zelf. Krankenkassen-ID der KV-Karte"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"NII","display":"National Insurance Organization Identifier","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Institutskennzeichen der Krankenkasse"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Nationale verzekeraar identificatie"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Insurance\r\nIn Germany the insurance identifier addressed as the payor.\r\nKrankenkassen-ID des Rechnungsempfängers\r\nUse case: a subdivision issues the card with their identifier, but the main division is going to pay the invoices.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: verzekering. In Duitsland is dit een nationale identificatie voor een betaler. Krankenkassen-ID des Rechnungsempfängers. Use case: een subdivisie geeft een kaart af met deze identificatie, maar de hoofddivisie betaalt de facturen."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"NIIP","display":"National Insurance Payor Identifier (Payor)","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Vertragskassennummer (VKNR)"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Nationale verzekeraar betaler identificatie (Betaler)"}]},{"code":"NNxxx","display":"National Person Identifier where the xxx is the ISO table 3166 3-character (alphabetic) country code","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Nationale persoonsidentificatie waarbij xxx de ISO-tabel 3166 3-tekens (alfabetisch) landcode is"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier that is unique to a nurse practitioner within the jurisdiction of a certifying board.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie die uniek is voor een nurse practitioner binnen het rechtsgebied van een certificeringsinstantie"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"NP","display":"Nurse practitioner number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Nurse practitioner nummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Insurance\r\nIn the US, the Assigning Authority for this value is typically CMS, but it may be used by all providers and insurance companies in HIPAA related transactions.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: verzekering. UZI-nummer."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"NPI","display":"National provider identifier","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Nationale zorgaanbieder/zorgverlener identificatie"}]},{"code":"OBI","display":"Observation Instance Identifier"},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number that is identificatie die uniek is voor een optometrist binnen het rechtsgebied van een nummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number identifying a person on number assigned to individual who is incarcerated.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie toegekend aan een persoon die inbewaringgesteld/gevangengezet is"}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"PCN","display":"Penitentiary/correctional institution identificatienummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A unique number assigned to the document affirming that a person is a citizen of the country. In the US this number is issued only by the State Department.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie die uniek is voor een wettig document dat bevestigt dat een persoon een staatsburger van het land is."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"PPN","display":"Passport number","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Passnummer"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Paspoortnummer"}]},{"code":"PRC","display":"Permanent Resident Card Number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Permanente verblijfsvergunning-nummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number that is unique to an individual provider, a provider group or an organization within an Assigning Authority.\r\nUse case: This allows PRN to represent either an individual (a nurse) or a group/organization (orthopedic surgery team).","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Use case: hiermee wordt een persoon (zoals een verpleegkundige) of een groep/organisatie (orthopedisch chirurgisch team) aangeduid."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"PRN","display":"Provider number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Zorgaanbieder/zorgverlener-nummer"}]},{"code":"PT","display":"Patient external identifier","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"externe Patienten-ID"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Extern patiëntnummer"}]},{"code":"QA","display":"QA number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Quality Assurance-nummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A generalized resource identifier.\r\nUse Case: An identifier type is needed to accommodate what are commonly known as resources. The resources can include human (e.g. a respiratory therapist), non-human (e.g., a companion animal), inanimate object (e.g., an exam room), organization (e.g., diabetic education class) or any other physical or logical entity.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Use case: een identificatietype is nodig voor wat algemeen 'resources' heten. Hieronder vallen menselijke resources (bijv. een respiratoir therapeut), niet-menselijke resources (bijv., een begeleidend dier), niet-levende entiteiten (bijv. een onderzoeksruimte), organisaties (bijv. diabetesonderwijsklas) of andere fysieke of logische entiteiten."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"RI","display":"Resource identifier","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Resource identicatie"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier that is unique to a registered nurse within the jurisdiction of the licensing board.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie die uniek is voor een geregistreerde verpleegkundige binnen het rechtsgebied van een licenserende instantie."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"RN","display":"Registered Nurse Number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Verpleegkundige registratienummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier that is unique to a pharmacist within the jurisdiction of the licensing board.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie die uniek is voor een apotheek binnen het rechtsgebied van een licenserende instantie."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"RPH","display":"Pharmacist license number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Apotheek licentienummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"An identifier for an individual enrolled with the Railroad Retirement Administration.  Analogous to, but distinct from, a Social Security Number","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie die uniek is voor een persoon binnen de Railroad Retirement Administration. Aanaloog aan, maar anders dan een SOFI-nummer."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"RR","display":"Railroad Retirement number","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Seniorenkartennummer"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Spoorwegen pensioneringsnummer"}]},{"code":"RRI","display":"Regional registry ID","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Regionaal register-ID"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class:  Insurance","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: verzekering."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"RRP","display":"Railroad Retirement Provider","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Spoorwegen pensioenaanbieder"}]},{"code":"SB","display":"Social Beneficiary Identifier"},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Identifier for a specimen. Used when it is not known if the specimen ID is a unique specimen ID (USID) or an ancestor ID (ASID).","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie die uniek is voor een monster. Gebruikt wanneer onbekend is of het monsternummer een Uniek monsternummer (USID) of een Oorspronkelijk monsternummer (ASID) is."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"SID","display":"Specimen ID","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Monsternummer"}]},{"code":"SL","display":"State license","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Staat-licentie"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Insurance\r\nAn identifier for a subscriber of an insurance policy which is unique for, and usually assigned by, the insurance carrier.\r\nUse Case: A person is the subscriber of an insurance policy. The person’s family may be plan members, but are not the subscriber.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie voor een hoofdverzekerde onder een verzekeringspolis die uniek is voor, en normaal wordt toegekend door, een verzekeraar."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"SN","display":"Subscriber Number","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Hoofdverzekerdenummer"}]},{"code":"SNBSN","display":"State assigned NDBS card Identifier"},{"code":"SNO","display":"Serial Number"},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number associated with a permit identifying a person who is a resident of a jurisdiction for the purpose of education.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie die uniek is voor een visum voor een persoon die inwoner van rechtsgebied is ten behoeve van een opleiding."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"SP","display":"Study Permit","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Opleidingsvisum"}]},{"code":"SR","display":"State registry ID","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Staat register-ID"}]},{"code":"SS","display":"Social Security number","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Sozialversicherungsnummer"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"SOFI-nummer"}]},{"code":"STN","display":"Shipment Tracking Number"},{"code":"TAX","display":"Tax ID number","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Steueridentifikationsnummer"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Belasting identificatie"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number assigned to a member of an indigenous group in Canada.\r\nUse Case: First Nation.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Use case: First Nation."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"TN","display":"Treaty Number/ (Canada)","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Verdragnummer/ resident status.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie die uniek is voor een apotheek binnen het rechtsgebied van een licenserende instantie."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"TPR","display":"Temporary Permanent Resident (Canada)","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Tijdelijk permanente inwoner (Canada)"}]},{"code":"TRL","display":"Training License Number"},{"code":"U","display":"Unspecified identifier","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Niet-gspecificeerde identificatie"}]},{"code":"UDI","display":"Universal Device Identifier"},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"Class: Insurance\r\nAn identifier for a provider within the CMS/Medicare program.  A globally unique identifier for the provider in the Medicare program.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Klasse: verzekering. Een identificatie van een zorgverlener/zorgaanbieder binnen het CMS/Medicare programma. Een wereldwij unieke identificatie voor de zorgverlener/zorgaanbieder in het Medicare programma."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"UPIN","display":"Medicare/CMS (formerly HCFA)'s Universal Physician Identification numbers","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Medicare/HCFA's Universele Zorgverlener Identificatie Nummers"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A unique identifier for a specimen.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een unieke identificatie voor een monster."}],"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation"}]}}],"code":"USID","display":"Unique Specimen ID","designation":[{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Uniek monsternummer"}]},{"code":"VN","display":"Visit number","designation":[{"language":"de","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Fallnummer"},{"language":"nl","use":{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/designation-usage","code":"display"},"value":"Bezoeknummer"}]},{"extension":[{"url":"http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/codesystem-concept-comments","valueString":"A number associated with a document identifying a person as a visitor of a jurisdiction or country.","_valueString":{"extension":[{"extension":[{"url":"lang","valueCode":"nl"},{"url":"content","valueString":"Een identificatie gekoppeld aan een visum voor een persoon als toerist in een </a></td><td>Anonymous identifier</td><td>An identifier for a living subject whose real identity is protected or suppressed</td><td>active</td><td>Justification: For public health reporting purposes, anonymous identifiers are occasionally used for protecting patient identity in reporting certain results. For instance, a state health department may choose to use a scheme for generating an anonymous identifier for reporting a patient that has had a positive human immunodeficiency virus antibody test. Anonymous identifiers can be used in PID 3 by replacing the medical record number or other non-anonymous identifier. The assigning authority for an anonymous identifier would be the state/local health department.</td><td>An identifier for a living subject whose real identity is protected or suppressed\r\nJustification: For public health reporting purposes, anonymous identifiers are occasionally used for protecting patient identity in reporting certain results. For instance, a state health department may choose to use a scheme for generating an anonymous identifier for reporting a patient that has had a positive human immunodeficiency virus antibody test. organization relative to controlled substance regulation and transactions.</td><td>active</td><td>Use case: This is a registration number that identifies an individual or organization relative to controlled substance regulation and transactions. \r\nA DEA number has a very precise and widely accepted meaning within the United States. Surprisingly, the US Drug Enforcement Administration does not solely assign DEA numbers in the United States. Hospitals have the authority to issue DEA numbers to their medical residents. These DEA numbers are based upon the hospital’s DEA number, but the authority rests with the hospital on the assignment to the residents. Thus, DEA as an Identifier Type is necessary in addition to DEA as an Assigning Authority.</td><td>An identifier for an individual or organization relative to controlled substance regulation and transactions.\r\nUse case: This is a registration number that identifies an individual or organization relative to controlled substance regulation and transactions. \r\nA DEA number has a very precise and widely accepted meaning within the United States. Surprisingly, the US Drug Enforcement Administration does not solely assign DEA numbers in the United States. Hospitals have the authority to issue DEA numbers to their medical residents. These DEA numbers are based upon the hospital’s DEA number, but the authority rests with the hospital on the assignment to the residents. Thus, DEA as an Identifier Type is necessary in addition to DEA as an Assigning Authority.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">DFN<a name=\"v2-0203-DFN\"> </a></td><td>Drug prepended to the code to obtain a concept IRI for RDF applications. This should be a valid, absolute IRI as defined in RFC 3987. See https://hl7.org/fhir/rdf.html#iri-stem for details on how this value may be used.</td><td/><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">JHN<a name=\"v2-0203-JHN\"> </a></td><td>Jurisdictional health number</td><td>Jurisdictional health number</td><td>active</td><td>Class: Insurance&lt;p&gt;2 uses: a) UK jurisdictional CHI number; b) Canadian provincial health card number:</td><td>Class: Insurance&lt;p&gt;2 uses: a) UK jurisdictional CHI number; b) Canadian provincial health card number:</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">KZVA<a name=\"v2-0203-KZVA\"> </a></td><td>Dentist Office Number</td><td>Identifier that can be used to unambiguously identify the practice of a dentist.</td><td>N</td><td>KZVA is an ID for the practice of a dentist.</td><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">LACSN<a name=\"v2-0203-LACSN\"> </a></td><td>Laboratory Accession ID</td><td>A laboratory accession id is used in the laboratory domain.</td><td>active</td><td>The concept of accession is used in other domains such as radiology, so the LACSN is used to distinguish a lab accession id from an radiology accession id</td><td>A laboratory accession id is used in the laboratory domain. The concept of accession is used in other domains such as radiology, so the LACSN is used to distinguish a lab accession id from an radiology accession id</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">LANR<a name=\"v2-0203-LANR\"> </a></td><td>Lifelong physician number</td><td>Lifelong physician number</td><td>active</td><td>Lebenslange Arztnummer - for use in German realm.</td><td>Lebenslange Arztnummer - for use in German realm.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">LI<a name=\"v2-0203-LI\"> </a></td><td>Labor and industries number</td><td>Labor and industries number</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr style=\"background-color: #ffeeee\"><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">L&amp;I<a name=\"v2-0203-L.38I\"> </a></td><td>Labor and industries number</td><td>Labor and industries number.  Note that this was introduced erroneously (with an ampersand in the code value) many years ago.</td><td>deprecated</td><td/><td/><td>Deprecated as of v 2.5; Use LI instead.</td><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">LN<a name=\"v2-0203-LN\"> </a></td><td>License number</td><td>License number</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">LR<a name=\"v2-0203-LR\"> </a></td><td>Local Registry ID</td><td>Local Registry ID</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MA<a name=\"v2-0203-MA\"> </a></td><td>Patient Medicaid number</td><td>Patient Medicaid number</td><td>active</td><td>Class: Insurance</td><td>Class: Insurance</td><td/><td>Armennummer</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MB<a name=\"v2-0203-MB\"> </a></td><td>Member Number</td><td>An identifier for the insured of an insurance policy (this insured always has a subscriber), usually assigned by the insurance carrier.</td><td>active</td><td>Use Case: Person is covered by an insurance policy. This person may or may not be the subscriber of the policy.</td><td>An identifier for the insured of an insurance policy (this insured always has a subscriber), usually assigned by the insurance carrier.&lt;p&gt;Use Case: Person is covered by an insurance policy. This person may or may not be the subscriber of the policy.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MC<a name=\"v2-0203-MC\"> </a></td><td>Patient's Medicare number</td><td>Patient's Medicare number</td><td>active</td><td>Class: Insurance</td><td>Class: Insurance</td><td/><td>Rentnernummer</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MCD<a name=\"v2-0203-MCD\"> </a></td><td>Practitioner Medicaid number</td><td>Practitioner Medicaid number</td><td>active</td><td>Class: Insurance</td><td>Class: Insurance</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MCN<a name=\"v2-0203-MCN\"> </a></td><td>Microchip Number</td><td>Microchip Number</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MCR<a name=\"v2-0203-MCR\"> </a></td><td>Practitioner Medicare number</td><td>Practitioner Medicare number</td><td>active</td><td>Class: Insurance</td><td>Class: Insurance</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MCT<a name=\"v2-0203-MCT\"> </a></td><td>Marriage Certificate</td><td>A number associated with a document identifying the event of a person's marriage.</td><td>active</td><td/><td>A number associated with a document identifying the event of a person's marriage.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MD<a name=\"v2-0203-MD\"> </a></td><td>Medical License number</td><td>An identifier that is unique to a medical doctor within the jurisdiction of a licensing board.</td><td>active</td><td>Use Case: These license numbers are sometimes used as identifiers. In some states, the same authority issues all three identifiers, e.g., medical, osteopathic, and physician assistant licenses all issued by one state medical board. For this case, the CX data type requires distinct identifier types to accurately interpret component 1. Additionally, the distinction among these license types is critical in most health care settings (this is not to convey full licensing information, which requires a segment to support all related attributes).</td><td>An identifier that is unique to a medical doctor within the jurisdiction of a licensing board.\r\nUse Case: These license numbers are sometimes used as identifiers. In some states, the same authority issues all three identifiers, e.g., medical, osteopathic, and physician assistant licenses all issued by one state medical board. For this case, the CX data type requires distinct identifier types to accurately interpret component 1. Additionally, the distinction among these license types is critical in most health care settings (this is not to convey full licensing information, which requires a segment to support all related attributes).</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MI<a name=\"v2-0203-MI\"> </a></td><td>Military ID number</td><td>A number assigned to an individual who has had military duty, but is not currently on active duty. The number is assigned by the DOD or Veterans' Affairs (VA).</td><td>active</td><td/><td>A number assigned to an individual who has had military duty, but is not currently on active duty. The number is assigned by the DOD or Veterans' Affairs (VA).</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MR<a name=\"v2-0203-MR\"> </a></td><td>Medical record number</td><td>An identifier that is unique to a patient within a set of medical records, not necessarily unique within an application.</td><td>active</td><td/><td>An identifier that is unique to a patient within a set of medical records, not necessarily unique within an application.</td><td/><td>Krankenaktennummer</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MRT<a name=\"v2-0203-MRT\"> </a></td><td>Temporary Medical Record Number</td><td>Temporary version of a Medical Record Number</td><td>active</td><td>Use Case: An ancillary system that does not normally assign medical record numbers is the first time to register a patient. This ancillary system will generate a temporary medical record number that will only be used until an official medical record number is assigned.</td><td>Temporary version of a Medical Record Number\r\nUse Case: An ancillary system that does not normally assign medical record numbers is the first time to register a patient. This ancillary system will generate a temporary medical record number that will only be used until an official medical record number is assigned.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">MS<a name=\"v2-0203-MS\"> </a></td><td>MasterCard</td><td>MasterCard</td><td>active</td><td>Deprecated and replaced by BC in v 2.5.</td><td>Deprecated and replaced by BC in v 2.5.</td><td/><td>MasterCard</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">NBSNR<a name=\"v2-0203-NBSNR\"> </a></td><td>Secondary physician office number</td><td>Secondary physician office number</td><td>active</td><td>Nebenbetriebsstättennummer - for use in the German realm.</td><td>Nebenbetriebsstättennummer - for use in the German realm.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">NE<a name=\"v2-0203-NE\"> </a></td><td>National employer identifier</td><td>National employer identifier</td><td>active</td><td>In the US, the Assigning Authority for this value is typically CMS, but it may be used by all providers and insurance companies in HIPAA related transactions.</td><td>In the US, the Assigning Authority for this value is typically CMS, but it may be used by all providers and insurance companies in HIPAA related transactions.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">NH<a name=\"v2-0203-NH\"> </a></td><td>National Health Plan identifier.&lt;p&gt;In the US, the Assigning Authority for this value is typically CMS, but it may be used by all providers and insurance companies in HIPAA related It is printed on the insurance card (health card). It is not to be confused with the health card number itself.&lt;p&gt;Krankenkassen-ID der KV-Karte</td><td>Class: Insurance\r\nIn Germany a national identifier for an insurance company. It is printed on the insurance card (health card). It is not to be confused with the health card number itself.&lt;p&gt;Krankenkassen-ID der KV-Karte</td><td/><td>Institutskennzeichen der Krankenkasse</td></tr><tr><td name=\"v2-0203-PGN\"> </a></td><td>Placer Group Number</td><td>Unique identifier assigned to a group of orders by the placer application.</td><td>N</td><td>This is analogous to the Placer Group Number ORC-4.</td><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PHC<a name=\"v2-0203-PHC\"> </a></td><td>Public Health Case Identifier</td><td>Identifier assigned to a person during a case investigation as part of a public health event</td><td>N</td><td>For example every person affected by the Norovirus outbreak on a cruise ship will be assigned a case ID for investigation and follow up</td><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PHE<a name=\"v2-0203-PHE\"> </a></td><td>Public Health Event Identifier</td><td>Identifier assigned to an event of interest to public health</td><td>N</td><td>For example an outbreak of Norovirus on a cruise ship – this is assigned by a public health jurisdiction at the local, state or federal level</td><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PHO<a name=\"v2-0203-PHO\"> </a></td><td>Public Health Official ID</td><td>An identifier for a person working at a public health agency (PHA),  assigned or issued by the agency</td><td>N</td><td>May need to identify contact in a PHA that approved a test request or is in charge of an investigation.</td><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PI<a name=\"v2-0203-PI\"> </a></td><td>Patient internal identifier</td><td>A number that is unique to a patient within an Assigning Authority.</td><td>active</td><td/><td>A number that is unique to a patient within an Assigning Authority.</td><td/><td>interne Patienten-ID</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PIN<a name=\"v2-0203-PIN\"> </a></td><td>Premises Identifier Number (US Official)</td><td>Identifier that uniquely identifies a geographic location in the US.</td><td>N</td><td>The owner of the premises, or a person designated by the owner of the premises, can register his/her location. A premises identification number, or PIN, is then permanently assigned to that location associating it with the mailing address. If there is no mailing address at the property, geographic coordinates—latitude and longitude—can be used instead to describe the location.   A premises identification number (PIN) is a unique, 7-digit code that includes both letters and numbers. Example: A123R69</td><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PKV<a name=\"v2-0203-PKV\"> </a></td><td>Insured's ID with Private Insurance</td><td>Identifier that can be used to unambiguously describe the ID of a patient with a private insurance company.</td><td>N</td><td>PKV is a patient ID with an private insurance company.</td><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PLAC<a name=\"v2-0203-PLAC\"> </a></td><td>Placer Identifier</td><td>An identifier for a request where the identifier is issued by the person or service making the request.</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PN<a name=\"v2-0203-PN\"> </a></td><td>Person number</td><td>A number that is unique to a living subject within an Assigning Authority.</td><td>active</td><td/><td>A number that is unique to a living subject within an Assigning Authority.</td><td/><td>Personen-ID</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PNT<a name=\"v2-0203-PNT\"> </a></td><td>Temporary Living Subject Number</td><td>Temporary version of a Living Subject Number.</td><td>active</td><td/><td>Temporary version of a Lining Subject Number.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PPIN<a name=\"v2-0203-PPIN\"> </a></td><td>Medicare/CMS Performing Provider Identification Number</td><td>Medicare/CMS Performing Provider Identification Number</td><td>active</td><td>Class:  Insurance</td><td>Class:  Insurance</td><td>Class:  Insurance</td><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PPN<a name=\"v2-0203-PPN\"> </a></td><td>Passport number</td><td>A unique number assigned to the document affirming that a person is a citizen of the country.</td><td>active</td><td>In the US this number is issued only by the State Department.</td><td>A unique number assigned to the document affirming that a person is a citizen of the country. In the US this number is issued only by the State Department.</td><td/><td>Passnummer</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PRC<a name=\"v2-0203-PRC\"> </a></td><td>Permanent Resident Card Number</td><td>Permanent Resident Card Number</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PRN<a name=\"v2-0203-PRN\"> </a></td><td>Provider number</td><td>A number that is unique to an individual provider, a provider group or an organization within an Assigning Authority.</td><td>active</td><td>Use case: This allows PRN to represent either an individual (a nurse) or a group/organization (orthopedic surgery team).</td><td>A number that is unique to an individual provider, a provider group or an organization within an Assigning Authority.&lt;p&gt;Use case: This allows PRN to represent either an individual (a nurse) or a group/organization (orthopedic surgery team).</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">PT<a name=\"v2-0203-PT\"> </a></td><td>Patient external identifier</td><td>Patient external identifier</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td>externe Patienten-ID</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">QA<a name=\"v2-0203-QA\"> </a></td><td>QA number</td><td>QA number</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">RI<a name=\"v2-0203-RI\"> </a></td><td>Resource identifier</td><td>A generalized resource identifier.</td><td>active</td><td>Use Case: An identifier type is needed to accommodate what are commonly known as resources. The resources can include human (e.g. a respiratory therapist), non-human (e.g., a companion animal), inanimate object (e.g., an exam room), organization (e.g., diabetic education class) or any other physical or logical entity.</td><td>A generalized resource identifier.\r\nUse Case: An identifier type is needed to accommodate what are commonly known as resources. The resources can include human (e.g. a respiratory therapist), non-human (e.g., a companion animal), inanimate object (e.g., an exam room), organization (e.g., diabetic education class) or any other physical or logical entity.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">RN<a name=\"v2-0203-RN\"> </a></td><td>Registered Nurse Number</td><td>An identifier that is unique to a registered nurse within the jurisdiction of the licensing board.</td><td>active</td><td/><td>An identifier that is unique to a registered nurse within the jurisdiction of the licensing board.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">RPH<a name=\"v2-0203-RPH\"> </a></td><td>Pharmacist license number</td><td>An identifier that is unique to a pharmacist within the jurisdiction of the licensing board.</td><td>active</td><td/><td>An identifier that is unique to a pharmacist within the jurisdiction of the licensing board.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">RR<a name=\"v2-0203-RR\"> </a></td><td>Railroad Retirement number</td><td>An identifier for an individual enrolled with the Railroad Retirement Administration.  Analogous to, but distinct from, a Social Security Number</td><td>active</td><td/><td>An identifier for an individual enrolled with the Railroad Retirement Administration.  Analogous to, but distinct from, a Social Security Number</td><td/><td>Seniorenkartennummer</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">RRI<a name=\"v2-0203-RRI\"> </a></td><td>Regional registry ID</td><td>Regional registry ID</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">RRP<a name=\"v2-0203-RRP\"> </a></td><td>Railroad Retirement Provider</td><td>Railroad Retirement Provider</td><td>active</td><td>Class:  Insurance</td><td>Class:  Insurance</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">SAMN<a name=\"v2-0203-SAMN\"> </a></td><td>SAMN# accession Number</td><td>The accession number for the BioSample data repository at the National Center for Biotechnology Information (NCBI)</td><td>N</td><td>This accession is a permanent record locator for the BioSample record which contains metadata about the biological sample.</td><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">SB<a name=\"v2-0203-SB\"> </a></td><td>Social Beneficiary Identifier</td><td>An identifier issued by a governmental organization to a person to identify the person should they apply for or receive social services and/or benefits</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">SID<a name=\"v2-0203-SID\"> </a></td><td>Specimen ID</td><td>Identifier for a specimen.</td><td>active</td><td>Used when it is not known if the specimen ID is a unique specimen ID (USID) or an ancestor ID (ASID).</td><td>Identifier for a specimen. Used when it is not known if the specimen ID is a unique specimen ID (USID) or an ancestor ID (ASID).</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">SL<a name=\"v2-0203-SL\"> </a></td><td>State license</td><td>State license</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">SN<a name=\"v2-0203-SN\"> </a></td><td>Subscriber Number</td><td>An identifier for a subscriber of an insurance policy which is unique for, and usually assigned by, the insurance carrier.</td><td>active</td><td>Class: Insurance\r\nUse Case: A person is the subscriber of an insurance policy. The person’s family may be plan members, but are not the subscriber.</td><td>Class: Insurance\r\nAn identifier for a subscriber of an insurance policy which is unique for, and usually assigned by, the insurance carrier.\r\nUse Case: A person is the subscriber of an insurance policy. The person’s family may be plan members, but are not the subscriber.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">SNBSN<a name=\"v2-0203-SNBSN\"> </a></td><td>State assigned NDBS card Identifier</td><td>The identifier on a Newborn Screening Dried Bloodspot (NDBS) card that is assigned by the state which provided the sample collection cards and to whom this information must be reported</td><td>N</td><td>For use either with OBX-5 as CX datatype, where OBX-3 uses LOINC 57716-3^State printed on filter paper card [Identifier] in NBS card^LN, or in SPM-31</td><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">SNO<a name=\"v2-0203-SNO\"> </a></td><td>Serial Number</td><td>An identifier affixed to an item by the manufacturer when it is first made, where each item has a different identifier.</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">SP<a name=\"v2-0203-SP\"> </a></td><td>Study Permit</td><td>A number associated with a permit identifying a person who is a resident of a jurisdiction for the purpose of education.</td><td>active</td><td/><td>A number associated with a permit identifying a person who is a resident of a jurisdiction for the purpose of education.</td><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">SR<a name=\"v2-0203-SR\"> </a></td><td>State registry ID</td><td>State registry ID</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">SRX<a name=\"v2-0203-SRX\"> </a></td><td>SRA Accession number</td><td>The accession number generated by the Sequence Read Archive (SRA) at the National Center for Biotechnology Information (NCBI) when sequence data are uploaded to NCBI.</td><td>N</td><td>This provides both the sequence data and metadata on how the sample was sequenced. – This accession is a permanent record locator for the submitted un-assembled sequence data.</td><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">SS<a name=\"v2-0203-SS\"> </a></td><td>Social Security number</td><td>Social Security number</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td>Sozialversicherungsnummer</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">STN<a name=\"v2-0203-STN\"> </a></td><td>Shipment Tracking Number</td><td>Identifier assigned to a package being shipped</td><td>N</td><td>For example the Fed Ex / UPS / DHS / USPS tracking number</td><td/><td/><td/></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">TAX<a name=\"v2-0203-TAX\"> </a></td><td>Tax ID number</td><td>Tax ID number</td><td>active</td><td/><td/><td/><td>Steueridentifikationsnummer</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">TN<a name=\"v2-0203-TN\"> </a></td><td>Treaty Number/ (Canada)</td><td>A number
